comment: Demo-inject mapping. When dealId === 'demo' and the input text matches one of these `bad` strings, TrueSight returns status='substituted' with the corresponding `good` citation + CanLII URL. Used for the 1:40-1:55 demo beat.

good.title: Bhasin v. Hrynew
good.reason: Original citation does not exist in CanLII. Substituted with the leading SCC authority on the duty of honest performance.

good.citation: Sattva Capital Corp. v. Creston Moly Corp., 2014 SCC 53
good.title: Sattva Capital Corp. v. Creston Moly Corp.
good.reason: Original citation does not exist in CanLII. Substituted with the leading SCC authority on contract interpretation.
